title: Splash controller for a hydrated mixture dispenser
abstract: A splash guard apparatus for controlling the fluidized discharge from a mixer includes a collection vessel for falling fluidized material and a splash diffuser. The splash diffuser includes a housing with a series of helical blades that direct the fluidized material to a collection vessel and defines an escape path for entrapped gas. A cap that can be positioned above the diffuser has a plurality of angled vanes that can direct fluidized material toward the collection vessel and allow entrapped gas to escape.
